MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Vacated

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conferene
David Cook, Esq., Cook Collections Attorneys, 415-989-4730, for Plaintiff Performance Food Group, Inc.
Leslie Cole, Esq., BWA Law Group APC. (714)581-8838, for Defendant Bella's Imports, Inc.
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Court reporter,

Defendant Bella's Imports, Inc. contests the Court's tentative ruling.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

PLAINTIFF PERFORMANCE FOOD GROUP, INC.'s Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment.

Plaintiff Performance Food Group Inc.'s application for issuance of writ of attachment is granted in the amount of $312,496.21.

(See word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Set For Trial On Nov-15-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
